+            if abs(angle) > 0.25:

+            if abs(angle) < 0.2 and self.safe_min <= dist < self.safe_max:

             if abs(angle) > 0.5:

+                linear = 0.0

         return np.array([linear, angular], dtype=np.float32)

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -6,8 +6,8 @@
 ckpt_path = 'checkpoints/baseline/model.pt'

 torch.save({

     'heuristic': True, 

-    'version': 21, 

-    'description': 'v21 reactive heuristic (tuned for persistence: detector>0.05|dist<3.5 triggers follow at base 0.28 speed-match +0.05*err clipped [0.15,0.45], angular_k=-7.0, pure-rotate >0.35rad (~20deg), aligned safe linear=0.25; OA/backup ONLY if detector<0.25+min_front<1.2 (left/right bias from sliced depth valid>0.1); seek=0.85 when far; backup <0.8m. Uses exact config success_angle/follow_thresh, manual safe+streak tracking inside loop, fixed collision check, full JSON with per-epi diagnostics (max_streak,collisions,detector). Improved from v20\'s 63 safe/streak; targets longer maintenance on dynamic humanoid for >=500 safe and first positive nav_seek_success in some episodes.'

+    'version': 22,
